description: Using the architectural floor plan at /home/ga/Documents/LibreCAD/floorplan.dxf, create a horizontal linear dimension on a new layer named 'Dimensions'. The dimension must measure the full width of the drawing's outermost bounding box from its leftmost to rightmost point and be positioned below the drawing. Save the result to /home/ga/Documents/LibreCAD/floorplan_dims.dxf.
